title-group.article-title: Combination therapy for moderate hypertension: a randomized trial

abstract.p: We evaluated ARB plus CCB versus ARB monotherapy in 612 patients with moderate hypertension. SBP fell by 8 mmHg more in the combination arm.

sec.title: Introduction
sec.p: Hypertension affects over 1 billion adults worldwide.

sec.title: Methods
sec.p: Double-blind RCT. 612 patients randomized 1:1 to valsartan 80mg+amlodipine 5mg vs valsartan 80mg monotherapy.

sec.title: Results
sec.p: Mean SBP fell by 8.4 mmHg more in the combination arm (95% CI -10.1, -6.7, P<0.001).

sec.title: Conclusion
sec.p: Combination therapy outperforms ARB monotherapy in moderate hypertension.
